sentences.target: Je prends ma bicyclette pour aller au parc.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pʁɑ̃ ma bisiklɛt puʁ ale o paʁk/

translations.fr: Je prends ma bicyclette pour aller au parc.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pʁɑ̃ ma bisiklɛt puʁ ale o paʁk/
translations.en: I take my bicycle to go to the park.
translations.de: Ich fahre mit dem Fahrrad in den Park.
translations.ru: Я еду в парк на велосипеде.
translations.vi: Tôi đạp xe đến công viên.
translations.nl: Ik ga met de fiets naar het park.
translations.uk: Я їду до парку на велосипеді.
translations.hi: मैं साइकिल से पार्क जा रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: 自転車で公園に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the verb 'prends'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, takes 'ma bicyclette' as direct object.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular agreeing with 'bicyclette'; marks 1st person singular possessor.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'prends'.
Preposition introducing an infinitival purpose clause ('aller au parc').
Infinitive verb; complement of the preposition 'pour', expressing the purpose of the action.
Contraction of preposition 'à' and definite article 'le'; introduces the locative complement 'parc'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au' indicating destination.

sentences.target: Tu as réparé la bicyclette ce matin.
sentences.reading: /ty a ʁepaʁe la bisiklɛt sə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Tu as réparé la bicyclette ce matin.
translations.ipa: /ty a ʁepaʁe la bisiklɛt sə matɛ̃/
translations.en: You fixed the bicycle this morning.
translations.de: Du hast heute Morgen das Fahrrad repariert.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今天早上修好了自行车。
translations.pt: Você consertou a bicicleta esta manhã.
translations.vi: Bạn đã sửa chiếc xe đạp sáng nay.
translations.nl: Je hebt vanmorgen de fiets gerepareerd.
translations.hi: तुमने आज सुबह साइकिल ठीक की.
translations.el: Επιδιόρθωσες το ποδήλατο σήμερα το πρωί.
translations.ro: Ai reparat bicicleta în această dimineață.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; forms the passé composé with the participle 'réparé'.
Past participle, main lexical verb in a compound tense; takes 'la bicyclette' as direct object (no agreement since the object follows).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'bicyclette'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'réparé'.
Demonstrative determiner modifying the temporal noun 'matin', forming a temporal adverbial ('ce matin').
Common noun, masculine singular; part of a temporal NP functioning as an adverbial complement.

sentences.target: On loue une bicyclette près de la plage.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ lu yn bisiklɛt pʁɛ də la plaʒ/

translations.fr: On loue une bicyclette près de la plage.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ lu yn bisiklɛt pʁɛ də la plaʒ/
translations.en: We’re renting a bicycle near the beach.
translations.es: Estamos alquilando una bicicleta cerca de la playa.
translations.de: Wir mieten ein Fahrrad in der Nähe des Strandes.
translations.it: Stiamo noleggiando una bicicletta vicino alla spiaggia.
translations.ko: 우리는 해변 근처에서 자전거를 빌리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在海滩附近租一辆自行车。
translations.yue: 我哋喺海灘附近租一架單車。
translations.pt: Estamos alugando uma bicicleta perto da praia.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang thuê một chiếc xe đạp gần bãi biển.
translations.nl: We huren een fiets vlak bij het strand.
translations.hi: हम समुद्र तट के पास एक साइकिल किराए पर ले रहे हैं.
translations.el: Νοικιάζουμε ένα ποδήλατο κοντά στην παραλία.
translations.nb: Vi leier en sykkel i nærheten av stranden.
translations.id: Kami sedang menyewa sebuah sepeda di dekat pantai.
translations.sv: Vi hyr en cykel nära stranden.
translations.ro: Închiriem o bicicletă aproape de plajă.
translations.da: Vi lejer en cykel tæt på stranden.
translations.ja: 私たちは海辺の近くで自転車を借りています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun; syntactically 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, takes 'une bicyclette' as direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'bicyclette'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'loue'.
Preposition functioning within the complex preposition 'près de', expressing proximity.
Preposition completing 'près de'; introduces the noun phrase 'la plage'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'plage'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'de', forming a locative complement.

sentences.target: Nous rangeons la bicyclette dans le garage.
sentences.reading: /nu ʁɑ̃ʒɔ̃ la bisiklɛt dɑ̃ lə gaʁaʒ/

translations.fr: Nous rangeons la bicyclette dans le garage.
translations.ipa: /nu ʁɑ̃ʒɔ̃ la bisiklɛt dɑ̃ lə gaʁaʒ/
translations.en: We’re putting the bicycle away in the garage.
translations.es: Guardamos la bicicleta en el garaje.
translations.de: Wir stellen das Fahrrad in die Garage.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把自行车放进车库。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cất chiếc xe đạp vào gara.
translations.nl: We zetten de fiets in de garage.
translations.hi: हम साइकिल को गैराज में रख रहे हैं.
translations.sv: Vi ställer in cykeln i garaget.
translations.ja: 自転車をガレージにしまいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, takes 'la bicyclette' as direct object. The 'e' maintains the soft [ʒ] before 'o'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'bicyclette'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'rangeons'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement ('le garage').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'garage'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans', indicating location.
